headline: Prudential (PRU) Up 0.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Prudential (PRU) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: PRU Expands Retirement Market Presence With Fixed Indexed Annuity
summary: Prudential Financial expands its retirement offerings with new fixed indexed annuities aimed at growing its advisor distribution network.

headline: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
summary: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.
